SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2014 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. FIOL. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLEGHER, ELLEN PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, CECILIA MARY $2,586.92 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,661.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
